metadata.name: Aider Precreation Verification Loop
metadata.description: Verify Aider's local Do Worker precreation path, then stop at the real-launch approval boundary.

objective.user_goal: Create a verifier-backed Aider Worker integration record without claiming provider execution before it is authorized.
objective.done_definition: A named non-production approval, reference-only credential injection, disposable Pod lifecycle, PTY evidence, provider smoke result, and cleanup evidence all pass the live verifier.
non_goals: Claim Aider is supported from precreation evidence alone.

ambiguity_triggers: live result has no cleanup evidence

secondary_user_query.prompt: Which named non-production credential bundle and resource may the Aider launch use, and may the disposable Pod be created and cleaned up?

assumption_policy.allowed: Evidence organization and read-only verification only.

block_if: a real credential would be used without named approval
a provider request would be sent without named approval

decomposition_policy.strategy: goal-based evidence loop with a human launch gate
decomposition_policy.minimum_task_granularity: one durable evidence artifact and one deterministic verifier result
decomposition_policy.dependency_policy: precreation tasks may proceed independently; live launch requires every precreation task and approval

loop_nodes.purpose: Maintain current Aider evidence and advance only when authorization changes the next safe action.

children.purpose: Reject stale or incomplete definition, runtime, browser, and database evidence.
Require named approval before credential injection, Pod creation, terminal use, provider smoke, and cleanup.

atomic_tasks.goal: Verify Aider Definition, AgentFile, optional model policy, and reference-only credential targets.
acceptance_criteria: Aider uses aider-pty and PTY.
Primary model binding is optional.

atomic_tasks.goal: Verify the current immutable image and connected Runner without launching a Pod.
acceptance_criteria: Runtime catalog and Docker image share one Aider digest.
Runner reports aider version 0.86.2 and a connected tunnel.

atomic_tasks.goal: Verify browser validation, plan, and template apply while proving no Aider launch or Pod was created.
acceptance_criteria: WorkerTemplate validation, plan, and apply evidence exist.
Matching Worker launches and Pods remain zero.

atomic_tasks.goal: Independently confirm that the current record remains precreation-only and not supported.
acceptance_criteria: Review rejects a supported claim without live evidence.
Review confirms no plaintext credential or provider response is stored.

atomic_tasks.goal: After named approval only, verify credential reference injection, disposable Pod creation, PTY use, provider smoke, and cleanup.
acceptance_criteria: Named non-production approval and resource scope are recorded.
Live launch, terminal, provider result, and cleanup pass the live verifier.

disallowed_when: a task changes shared state or uses an external credential
subagent_activation.token_budget_policy: Return evidence paths, commands, exit codes, and blockers only.

context_policy.tool_output_trimming: Retain commands, exit codes, facts, and evidence paths; exclude raw credentials and authorization headers.

compaction.summary_contract: Preserve Worker scope, evidence, verifier outcomes, approval state, and blockers.

success: live verifier passes after named approval
all five acceptance items are checked
failure: a protected verifier would need weakening
the approved disposable resource cannot be cleaned up

verifiers.expected_result: exit 0 only for a current, internally consistent precreation record that remains blocked for live launch
verifiers.scope: contract, image, Runner, browser, database, migration, and review evidence

verifiers.expected_result: exit 0 only after named approval and disposable lifecycle evidence exist
verifiers.scope: credential reference, Pod, PTY, provider smoke, and cleanup

anti_gaming_rules: Do not weaken verification or replace missing live evidence with a status claim.
Do not edit evidence to hide a failed browser, Runner, or database assertion.

cost_policy.optimization_goal: Use deterministic local checks before any approved external operation.

user_confirmation.prompt: May the loop use one named non-production Aider credential bundle and create then clean up one disposable Pod?

drift_checks: precreation evidence is not promoted to support

escalation_required_when: a public contract change is needed

execution_adapters.approval_model: human approval required for live launch
execution_adapters.context_reload_model: reload state files at each cycle

portability_policy.platform_selection_query: Use Codex while this loop is local; regenerate adapters before moving runtimes.

failure_modes.mitigation: Refresh image and catalog facts before accepting runtime evidence.
Set blocked_human_gate and request named scope.
Stop and escalate; do not mark support.

acceptance_checklist.update_policy: Check an item only after its verifier-backed criteria and artifacts exist.

acceptance_criteria: Aider uses aider-pty and PTY.
Primary model binding is optional.
Runtime catalog and Docker image share one Aider digest.
Runner reports aider version 0.86.2 and a connected tunnel.
WorkerTemplate validation, plan, and apply evidence exist.
Matching Worker launches and Pods remain zero.
Review rejects a supported claim without live evidence.
Review confirms no plaintext credential or provider response is stored.
Named non-production approval and resource scope are recorded.
Live launch, terminal, provider result, and cleanup pass the live verifier.

escalation.condition: A human gate, cleanup failure, live verifier failure, or no-progress limit is reached.
